enumerate_node_list:
enum m88k_regnum
{
  M88K_R0_REGNUM,
  M88K_R1_REGNUM,		/* Return address (hardware).  */
  M88K_R2_REGNUM,
  M88K_R3_REGNUM,
  M88K_R12_REGNUM = 12,
  M88K_R30_REGNUM = 30,		/* Frame pointer.  */
  M88K_R31_REGNUM,		/* Stack pointer.  */
  M88K_EPSR_REGNUM,
  M88K_FPSR_REGNUM,
  M88K_FPCR_REGNUM,
  M88K_SXIP_REGNUM,
  M88K_SNIP_REGNUM,
  M88K_SFIP_REGNUM,
  M88K_NUM_REGS			/* Number of machine registers.  */

}
